name: acks-god-mode
description: ACKS God Mode — ACKS II campaign engine + world-state data layer. Engine modules load headless in Node; this manifest exists to run the smoke suites (no runtime dependencies).

scripts.test: node tests/smoke.js && node tests/turn-cycle-v2.smoke.js && node tests/agricultural-projects.smoke.js && node tests/journeys.smoke.js && node tests/events.smoke.js && node tests/migrations.smoke.js
